corpus.title: Follow-up: Global Nutrition Consortium — Propagated Report
corpus.snippet: Follow-up coverage: A meta-analysis found that diets high in processed sugar inc...
corpus.content:
Breaking: Global Nutrition Consortium faces continued scrutiny amid reports circulating about scientific

Multiple sources now confirm: A meta-analysis found that diets high in processed sugar increased the risk of Type 2 diabetes by 66%, controlling for BMI. According to sources familiar with the matter, the decision follows months of internal deliberation. Industry analysts noted the move signals a broader shift in scientific strategy. A spokesperson for Global Nutrition Consortium declined to comment beyond the official statement.
